backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that combines blob storage mixin with user profile management, page content, pricing entries, and access control (admin/user roles) using role-based permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that all introductory booking CTAs across pages and components have been updated to use the Calendly URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing each page, component, hook, and config file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/ic-assets.json: ICP asset configuration that ensures the .well-known directory is included (not ignored) when deploying frontend assets.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with German language, SEO meta description for online couples coaching, and Plausible Analytics tracking script for www.paarweg.com.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: ICP domain verification file listing paarweg.com and www.paarweg.com as the custom domains for the canister.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all public pages of www.paarweg.com including homepage, location landing pages (Zurich, Basel, Swiss online), service pages, and legal page with priorities and change frequencies.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes (including Zurich, Basel, and Swiss online landing pages), wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/admin/ThemeHexCo: Admin UI card component that displays runtime-computed HEX color values for the page background and primary CTA button, with copy-to-clipboard functionality for each color.
frontend/src/components/CalendlyInlineWi: React component that renders a Calendly inline booking widget using a script hook, defaulting to the updated URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Site-wide layout component providing sticky header with desktop/mobile navigation, a booking CTA button, and footer; all Calendly links use the updated URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon.
frontend/src/components/MobileReadMore.t: Mobile-only collapsible content component that truncates long content with a gradient fade and a toggle button, controlled by a feature flag to enable or disable compacting behavior.
frontend/src/config/featureFlags.ts: Centralized feature flag configuration object; currently contains a single flag to enable or disable mobile 'Read more / Show less' content compacting behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendlyScript.ts: React hook that lazily injects the Calendly external widget script and CSS into the document and returns a boolean indicating when the widget is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useComputedThemeHexCo: React hook that reads runtime computed CSS theme colors by temporarily inserting probe DOM elements, returning HEX values for background and primary button colors and recomputing on dark mode changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching hardcoded CSR metadata and generating a PKCS#10 certificate signing request client-side using the Web Crypto API.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the app's warm sand/terracotta color theme, plus base body and typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page for Roland Soder's PaarWeg coaching site, displaying a hero section with photo, biography, credentials, and a Calendly booking button. Sets page-specific SEO metadata (title, description, canonical, OG tags) on mount.
frontend/src/pages/BaselCouplesLandingPa: SEO-optimized landing page targeting couples seeking counseling in Basel, with hero, benefits, and an inline Calendly booking widget. Injects meta tags, OG tags, and JSON-LD structured data for local service schema.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact and appointment booking page showing direct contact options (email, phone) alongside an inline Calendly widget for scheduling sessions. Sets SEO metadata including title, description, canonical URL, and OG tags on mount.
frontend/src/pages/CouplesPage.tsx: Service page describing PaarWeg's couples coaching offering, with a hero section, feature cards, and a Calendly booking CTA. Configures SEO metadata (title, description, canonical, OG tags) via useEffect on mount.
frontend/src/pages/CSRGeneratorPage.tsx: Admin/utility page that auto-generates an SSL Certificate Signing Request (CSR) on load using a React Query mutation, then displays the CSR and public key with copy and download actions. Includes a DNS availability check and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/DomainVerificationPag: A diagnostic page that fetches `/.well-known/ic-domains` and displays whether the Internet Computer domain verification file is correctly configured for www.paarweg.com.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page for PaarWeg that sets SEO metadata (title, Open Graph, Twitter cards, structured data) and renders hero content with a Calendly booking link.
frontend/src/pages/LegalPage.tsx: Displays the Impressum (legal notice) and Datenschutz (privacy policy) information for Roland Soder Coaching, including contact details, liability disclaimers, and copyright notice.
frontend/src/pages/MenPage.tsx: A coaching-for-men landing page with SEO metadata setup, a hero section describing the service, and a Calendly booking button.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Displays pricing information for PaarWeg coaching sessions (190 CHF / 90 min) with an FAQ accordion, SEO metadata, and a Calendly booking link.
frontend/src/pages/SitemapPage.tsx: Renders a human-readable XML sitemap listing all public PaarWeg URLs with priorities and change frequencies, intended for submission to search engines.
frontend/src/pages/SwissOnlineCouplesLan: Landing page for online couples counseling across Switzerland, setting SEO metadata (title, description, OG tags, JSON-LD) and rendering a hero section with a Calendly booking widget.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalStatusPage.t: Admin/diagnostic page that runs and displays status checks for DNS, SSL, WWW CNAME, 301 redirects, analytics, and domain resolution, with a theme hex codes section.
frontend/src/pages/WomenPage.tsx: Landing page targeting women seeking relationship coaching, with SEO metadata injection and a hero section featuring a Calendly booking CTA.
frontend/src/pages/ZurichCouplesLandingP: Location-specific landing page for couples counseling in Zürich, injecting SEO metadata and JSON-LD structured data and embedding a Calendly inline booking widget.
frontend/src/types/calendly.d.ts: TypeScript declaration file that extends the global Window interface with Calendly SDK types for inline widget, popup widget, and related methods.
frontend/src/utils/color.ts: Utility module providing functions to convert computed CSS color strings (rgb, rgba, oklch) into uppercase HEX format.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Paarweg frontend, extending the theme with oklch-based design tokens (colors, border radius, shadows, animations) and registering the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the Paarweg project's state at version 3, recording one completed feature and one pending action request to update all Kennenlerntermin booking buttons/links to the Calendly URL https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon across all pages and components.
